title: React Dashboard UI Bug Fixes
skills: FRONTEND DEVELOPMENT | Frontend Development | Web Development | Debugging | User Interface / IA | JavaScript | CSS | HTML | PHP
full_description:
PROJECT: React/CSS Dashboard UI Fixes Needed

I’m looking for a React/CSS frontend developer who can help rectify a visual inconsistency issue in an existing dashboard interface.

The issue:
Some pages in the dashboard interface appear slightly off-white/yellow, while another page appears clean pure white. The goal is to make the interface consistent so all pages use the same clean white background and visual structure.

What has already been checked:

* `.crm-main` shows white background
* `--bg` resolves to `#ffffff`
* `.crm-sidebar` shows white background
* `main.crm-content` shows white background
* the page wrapper also appears to be white
* one stats/card row also appears to be white
* the issue may be coming from a child wrapper, page-specific CSS, card/section background, gradient, overlay, cached CSS/build, or visual rendering inconsistency

What I need:

* Find the exact source of the off-white/yellow appearance
* Rectify the issue cleanly
* Keep the layout and design unchanged
* Do not redesign the dashboard
* Do not rebuild the frontend
* Do not change unrelated components
* Make all dashboard pages visually consistent
* Confirm the fix with before/after screenshots

Questions:

1. Have you worked with React dashboards where one page looks visually different because of nested wrappers, CSS variables, or page-specific styles?
2. Can you debug this using Chrome DevTools and inspect the exact element/class causing the color difference?
3. Can you compare two pages and trace the background from `body`, `#root`, layout wrapper, content wrapper, page wrapper, and child sections?
4. Can you identify whether the issue is real CSS, cached build, DevTools overlay, browser rendering, or a child component background?
5. Can you make a minimal fix without redesigning or changing the layout?

Please reply with:

* Whether you’ve fixed this kind of React/CSS dashboard styling issue before
* How soon you can start
* What access you would need
* Confirmation that you can make a clean minimal fix without changing the design

Reconcile payroll reports against staffing records. 
Accounts Receivable & Credit Control
Raise monthly invoices to local authorities and commissioning bodies. 
Ensure placement data and occupancy records are accurate before invoicing. 
Monitor outstanding invoices and proactively chase overdue payments. 
Reconcile payments received against invoices. 
Produce aged debtor reports and provide updates to management. 
Build positive working relationships with local authority finance departments. 
Purchase Ledger & Expenditure Monitoring
Review and reconcile expenditure across all homes. 
Consolidate bank statements and analyse spending patterns. 
Match transactions against receipts and supporting documentation. 
Investigate discrepancies and unusual expenditure. 
Assist managers in maintaining spending within agreed budgets. 
Financial Administration
Perform bank reconciliations. 
Maintain accurate financial records and filing systems. 
Assist with month-end processes. 
Support VAT and year-end accounting requirements. 
Prepare financial reports and summaries for management.

oHome expenditure 
oPayroll costs

oPayroll processes 
oCredit control 
oBank reconciliations 
oAccounts receivable and payable 
Experience using accounting software such as Xero, QuickBooks, Sage, or similar. 
Advanced Microsoft Excel skills. 
Excellent attention to detail and accuracy. 
Strong organisational and time-management skills. 
Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities. 
Desirable Requirements
Experience working with UK organisations. 
Experience in supported accommodation, social care, housing, healthcare, or education sectors. 
Knowledge of UK payroll processes. 
Familiarity with local authority invoicing and commissioning arrangements. 
A bookkeeping or accounting qualification (AAT, ICB, SAIBA, SAIPA, ACCA, CIMA, or equivalent). 
Personal Attributes
We are looking for someone who is:
Highly organised and methodical. 
Proactive and solutions-focused. 
Comfortable communicating with managers and external stakeholders. 
Trustworthy and able to handle confidential information.

2. 1500 mm × 2700 mm 
3. 900 mm × 2700 mm 

Deliverables

• A quick screenshot or PDF proof for each size so I can cross-check before release 

I will verify the files in Fusion 360 and pass them directly to the laser shop, so accuracy is critical. Let me know if anything in the PDF is unclear, otherwise feel free to get started as soon as you receive the file.

title: Foam RC Trainer CAD Design
skills: FUSION 360 | Fusion 360 | 3D Modelling | Aerospace Engineering | 3D Design | CAD/CAM | Mechanical Engineering | AutoCAD | Solidworks
full_description:
I’m putting together a compact, beginner-friendly RC trainer built entirely from 3 mm XPS/Depron and need a complete digital package to finish the concept. The model has a 50 cm wingspan and must fly slow, stay rock-steady in level flight, and launch comfortably from a hand-toss without stalling. It will run a small outrunner brushless motor on a 3-cell Li-Po, so please keep wing loading low and incorporate generous dihedral and ample tail volume for forgiving handling.

You’ll be working in Fusion 360—I’ll need the native file plus exports—and I’m after a full detailed design, not just basic ribs and spars. Every component that matters for a clean build should be there: interlocking fuselage formers, removable wing, servo pockets, battery tray, motor mount, pushrod routing, and any small reinforcement details that make life easier for a first-time builder.

To gauge performance and finalise centre of gravity, I also want a quick but solid XFLR5 analysis (polar graphs and stability derivatives are enough) along with a CG spreadsheet or annotated drawing that shows the target range with a 3S 450–850 mAh pack.

Key deliverables 
• Fusion 360 file (plus STEP/DXF exports) 
• Printable foam-cutting templates laid out on A4/A3 sheets 
• CG calculation sheet or annotated diagram 
• XFLR5 project file and summary PDF of key plots

Acceptance 
The design should slot together from flat-cut parts without hot-wire shaping, balance at the calculated CG with a 3S pack, and hit a predicted wing loading under 80 g/dm². Provide me with a short build note or screenshot set proving the parts fit correctly in the CAD assembly.

If everything looks good in the review pass, we’ll sign off and I’ll start cutting foam right away.

When you respond, please highlight experience on similar fast-moving, playful edits—links to finished videos are perfect. 

Deliverable: the fully edited video in 1080p H.264 plus the project file (Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve are both fine). Turnaround is flexible within a week once assets are shared, and I’m happy to give quick feedback so we can lock the final cut efficiently.

skills: GOOGLE ADS | Google Ads | Digital Marketing | Conversion Rate Optimization | Facebook Marketing | Google Adwords | Advertising | Instagram Marketing | Marketing Strategy | Creative Design | Instagram Ads

About Us

We are a fast-growing kidswear fashion brand looking for an experienced Performance Marketing Specialist/Agency to manage and scale our Meta (Facebook & Instagram) and Google Ads accounts.

We are seeking a results-driven partner who combines performance marketing expertise, creative excellence, AI-powered optimization, and data-driven decision-making to generate consistent revenue growth.

Scope of Work
Performance Marketing Management
Complete management of Meta Ads and Google Ads accounts.
Campaign planning, setup, optimization, scaling, and reporting.
Audience research, segmentation, and retargeting strategies.
Conversion tracking, pixel setup, GA4 integration, and attribution analysis.
Budget allocation and optimization across platforms.
Landing page and funnel recommendations to improve conversion rates.
Creative Development

Static image creatives.
Carousel creatives.
UGC-style ad creatives.
Video advertisements and reels.
Ad copies, headlines, hooks, and CTAs.
Creative variations for testing and scaling.
AI & Automation

Implement creative testing frameworks using AI-assisted insights.
Use predictive analytics, audience modeling, and automated optimization wherever applicable.
Continuously identify opportunities to improve ROAS and reduce CAC.
Strategy & Growth
Develop monthly and quarterly growth strategies.
Identify winning products and scaling opportunities.
Build remarketing and customer retention campaigns.
Conduct competitor analysis and market research.
Present actionable recommendations backed by data.
Key Performance Expectations

The engagement will be performance-oriented.

Target KPIs:

Minimum 4X ROAS on advertising spend.
Generate at least ₹5,00,000 in monthly attributable revenue through paid campaigns.
Continuous improvement in CAC, CTR, conversion rate, and customer acquisition efficiency.

Applicants must clearly explain:

How they plan to achieve these targets.
Their previous results and case studies.
Their creative production process.
Their reporting methodology.
Required Experience
Proven experience managing Meta and Google Ads for D2C/eCommerce brands.
Strong portfolio of successful campaigns.
Experience with Shopify stores.
Knowledge of GA4, Meta Pixel, Conversion API, Google Tag Manager, and Merchant Center.
Ability to create high-converting creatives in-house.
Experience using AI tools for campaign optimization and creative generation.
Deliverables
Weekly performance reports.
Monthly strategy review.
Creative calendar.
Ongoing creative production (static + video).
Campaign optimization and scaling recommendations.
Revenue and ROAS tracking dashboard.

I’m looking for a results-driven marketer who can take full ownership of my Instagram, Linkedin presence and turn it into a steady source of new clients and followers, engagement, etc. The job breaks down into three core activities:

• Ad boosting & targeting – Set up and continually refine paid promotions so each post reaches the right audience segments, stretches engagement and converts profile visitors into leads.

I’m open to your preferred design and analytics tools—whether that’s Canva, Adobe Suite, Meta Business Suite, or other reliable platforms—as long as they help you work efficiently and show measurable gains.

To move forward, please share relevant past work: links to live Instagram feeds you’ve managed, before/after metrics, sample ads or creative you’ve produced. A quick note on the strategy you’d apply to my niche will also help me gauge fit.

Once we agree on direction, I’ll provide brand assets and any product details you need so you can hit the ground running. Looking forward to partnering with someone who’s as obsessed with compelling visuals and data-backed growth as I am.

Excited to share my latest AI project – a Perplexity-style AI Chatbot built using the MERN Stack!

Over the past few weeks, I developed a full-stack AI-powered search and chat platform that combines conversational intelligence with real-time web information retrieval.

 Full-stack architecture with scalable backend APIs

Building this chatbot strengthened my understanding of how modern AI products combine Large Language Models, search systems, and web technologies to deliver accurate and up-to-date information.
